name: Turkey Broccoli Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 Cracker Barrel Mushroom Soup mix (10 1/2 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Cook broccoli according to package directions.
3. Layer ingredients in a 12 x 8 inch baking dish.
4. Spread turkey evenly on top of the broccoli.
5. Combine soup mix with milk and stir until smooth.
6. Pour the mixture over the turkey layer.
7. Sprinkle grated cheese on top.
8. Bake for 30 minutes.
9. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
1/6 recipe - 199 calories, 2 medium-fat meat, 2 vegetables, 20.3 gm protein, 9.1 gm fat, 9.3 gm carbohydrate, 534.2 mg sodium, 372.6 mg potassium, 2.3 gm fiber, 47 mg cholesterol.
Source: American Diabetes Association Family Cookbook, Volume 1, 1987; Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, November 1993
